campaigns.name: High Value Winback
campaigns.goal: Bring back high value customers who have not purchased in 60 days and spent more than 12000 previously.
campaigns.message: Hey {{name}}, we saved a fresh 20% comeback offer on {{category}} for you. Tap today and make your next order feel easy.
